description: Planted signals the reflect skill must surface from fixtures/planted_session.jsonl, graded by deterministic keyword checks over the reflection report.

expectations.name: bun-not-npm rule
expectations.why: User corrected npm-vs-bun twice; a one-line agent rule prevents it.

expectations.name: verbose test log context reduction
expectations.why: One verbose test run dominated context and the user complained.

expectations.name: repeated deploy sequence
expectations.why: The same build+deploy+curl sequence ran twice; deserves a script or command.

must_not.name: README typo is not a durable learning
must_not.why: One-off fix; extracting it means the gate failed.
